title: Fix archive recovery when external bundle already exists

tasks.title: Add failing regression coverage for external-bundle-present recovery creating/reconciling missing in-repo archive.
tasks.verification: Added regression coverage for recovery when an external archive bundle already exists but in-repo archive is missing. Initial attempt exposed test setup import issue; corrected red/green path and added reconcileInRepoArchive coverage. Test now passes after implementation.
tasks.summary: Added regression coverage for recovery when an external archive bundle already exists but in-repo archive is missing. Initial attempt exposed test setup import issue; corrected red/green path and added reconcileInRepoArchive coverage. Test now passes after implementation.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added regression coverage for recovery when an external archive bundle already exists but in-repo archive is missing. Initial attempt exposed test setup import issue; corrected red/green path and added reconcileInRepoArchive coverage. Test now passes after implementation.

tasks.title: Implement idempotent archive recovery ordering so in-repo archive reconciliation is not skipped.
tasks.verification: Implemented idempotent archive recovery ordering. Added reconcileInRepoArchive helper that returns an existing in-repo archive bundle if present or creates one if missing. Updated adv_change_archive existing-external-bundle recovery path to call reconciliation before synthesizing archive success, preserving state-transition recovery while ensuring in-repo archive is not skipped.
tasks.summary: Implemented idempotent archive recovery ordering. Added reconcileInRepoArchive helper that returns an existing in-repo archive bundle if present or creates one if missing. Updated adv_change_archive existing-external-bundle recovery path to call reconciliation before synthesizing archive success, preserving state-transition recovery while ensuring in-repo archive is not skipped.
tasks.implementation_summary: Implemented idempotent archive recovery ordering. Added reconcileInRepoArchive helper that returns an existing in-repo archive bundle if present or creates one if missing. Updated adv_change_archive existing-external-bundle recovery path to call reconciliation before synthesizing archive success, preserving state-transition recovery while ensuring in-repo archive is not skipped.

tasks.title: Run focused archive recovery tests and plugin check; document verification evidence.
tasks.verification: pnpm test --run src/archive/archive.test.ts src/tools/change.test.ts exited 0; pnpm run check exited 0.

wisdom.content: Archive retry recovery must reconcile both planes: if external archive bundle already exists, still ensure in-repo archive bundle exists before synthesizing archive success/status transition. Treat in-repo reconciliation as idempotent create-if-missing, return-existing-if-present.

proposal.approval_evidence: Batch accepted by user in OpenCode chat; structured GH response posted.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed autonomously from issue #53, proposal, project context, and archive wisdom. This is archive recovery ordering/idempotence bug; no HITL tradeoff or conflict detected.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed autonomously. Plan ensures external bundle presence does not skip in-repo archive reconciliation while preserving idempotence.

planning.approval_evidence: Planning approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #53.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete. Added idempotent reconcileInRepoArchive helper and wired adv_change_archive existing-external-bundle recovery path to reconcile missing in-repo archive before synthesizing success/status transition. Added regression coverage. Verification: pnpm test --run src/archive/archive.test.ts src/tools/change.test.ts passed; pnpm run check passed. Checkpoint commit 48f3883e15d0d0a54d508ccbd726b9739240437f.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Batch acceptance approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes

release.approval_evidence: Batch release approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes
